query: Write Mathematica code to compute the Ricci tensor of the Schwarzschild metric.
Give me Wolfram Language to evaluate the integral of x^2 e^{-x} from 0 to infinity.
Set up a Mathematica notebook that computes the Riemann tensor of AdS5 in Poincare coordinates.
I need WL code that builds the Christoffel symbols for a flat FRW metric with scale factor a(t).
Compute the Kretschmann scalar of the Kerr metric in Mathematica and show me the code you used.
Can you write Wolfram code to series-expand Sin[x]/x to order 10 around x=0?
Produce a runnable Mathematica script that diagonalizes this 4x4 Hamiltonian and returns its eigenvectors.
Write Wolfram Language to compute the Einstein tensor for a metric I'll give you.
Generate Mathematica code that derives the geodesic equations from a given Lagrangian.
Set up the calculation of the Weyl tensor for a conformally flat metric in Mathematica.
Is my hand computation of the Schwarzschild Ricci scalar correct? I got 0, can you check?
Check whether the integral of x^2 e^{-x} from 0 to infinity equals 2.
Find the error in my derivation of the geodesic equation, here are my steps.
Did I get the sign right on these Christoffel symbols? Here's my work, please verify.
Write a Python script to scrape the latest arXiv hep-th listings.
Explain conceptually why anti-de Sitter space is maximally symmetric.
Prove that the Riemann tensor has 20 independent components in four dimensions.
Refactor this JavaScript function to use async/await instead of callbacks.
What's the difference between the OGRe and xAct packages?
Summarize the main results of this general relativity paper for me.
